title: ItemLocator
description: ItemLocator helps players track and locate items in Minecraft chests by marking their locations with glowing beacons, making organization and retrieval easier.
body:
# ItemLocator
ItemLocator is a useful Minecraft plugin designed for server administrators and players, providing an intuitive way to track and locate items in containers like chests, barrels, shulker boxes, and more. With advanced item tracking, players can easily find and organize their items with minimal effort, utilizing glowing beacons to mark item locations.

### Key Features:
- Track Item Locations: Automatically track the locations of items placed in chests or other containers.
- Glowing Beacons: Visualize item locations with glowing beams that can be seen through blocks, making it easy to find your stored items.
- Player-Specific Views: Each player can view their own tracked items in containers, ensuring that no one else can see your chest's contents.
- GUI-Based Searching: Players can open a custom GUI that displays all tracked items, allowing for quick navigation and retrieval.
- Command-Based Search: Players can search for specific items using a simple command and view their locations instantly.
- Customizable Permissions: Server administrators can configure who has access to item tracking and searching features, maintaining control over player actions.
### Commands:
- /itemlocator gui – Opens a GUI displaying all tracked items for the player.
- /itemlocator locate <material> – Searches for a specific item by name and displays its locations.
### Support and Contributions:
If you encounter any issues or would like to contribute to the development of this plugin, feel free to visit the GitHub repository and follow the contributing guidelines.
